title: LocalAntiCheat - Barium
description: Its anti cheat that runs locally on your computer as a mod it detects players which use cheats like: Aimbot, Autototem, Killaura, Reach, Velocity and so on there is only Reach and autototem at the time
body:
This application functions as a client-side anti-cheat system that operates locally on your computer through a modification framework. The software is designed to identify and detect players who employ various unauthorized cheating mechanisms, including but not limited to:

Aimbot 
Autototem 
Killaura 
Reach modifications 
Velocity alterations 

**Important Notice**: Please be advised that the Killaura and Aimbot detection modules are currently experiencing operational issues and may not function as intended. Im actively working to resolve this matter and restore full functionality to these detection components.
The system continuously monitors gameplay patterns and behavioral anomalies to maintain competitive integrity within the gaming environment.
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da856050d5a6da22c14dfe3c687e7d5ed88c80b6.png)


P.S: This might not be accurate its rare but still possible so if you are a server owner use server side anti cheat for accuracy and do not ban players just because mod flagged it

(This is beta this might not be acurate)
